posts.headline: Knights flags the questions every Iraq watcher should ask before assessing an Ali Zaidi premiership
posts.summary: Mike Knights opens his assessment of the Zaidi PM-designation by listing the structural variables that will shape the cabinet, signalling the bar he sets for the new premier sits at policy delivery rather than political debut.

posts.headline: Video circulates of the moment Ali Falih al-Zaidi is tasked with the Iraqi premiership
posts.summary: AMrym shares the live footage of President Amidi formally tasking Ali Falih al-Zaidi with forming the next Iraqi government, the procedural milestone that ends the four-month Coordination Framework deadlock. Translated from Arabic.

posts.headline: Statement from Iraqi PM-designate Ali Falih al-Zaidi after the formal tasking
posts.summary: AMrym carries the first statement from al-Zaidi as PM-designate, in which he frames the cabinet-formation horizon and signals the priority files he will move on under the 30-day Article 76 clock. Translated from Arabic.

posts.headline: Sudani's message to the Reconstruction and Development bloc on backing the al-Zaidi nomination
posts.summary: AMrym shares a circulated message from caretaker PM Sudani directing his Reconstruction and Development bloc to fall in behind the al-Zaidi designation, the political instruction that makes the bloc's votes available for the upcoming confidence count. Translated from Arabic.

posts.headline: Coordination Framework reconvenes and consolidates around al-Zaidi as the consensus PM candidate
posts.summary: AMrym reports the Coordination Framework reconvened on Monday and aligned on Ali Falih al-Zaidi, chairman of Al-Janoob Islamic Bank, as its premiership pick. Translated from Arabic.

posts.headline: Iraq's three presidencies convene at Peace Palace ahead of the formal PM tasking
posts.summary: AMrym carries the source flag that the heads of the three presidencies were gathering at the Peace Palace in Baghdad immediately ahead of the prime-ministerial tasking, the procedural step that preceded President Amidi's call to al-Zaidi. Translated from Arabic.

posts.headline: Profile of PM-designate Ali Falih Kazem al-Zaidi circulating through Iraqi networks
posts.summary: AMrym publishes a biographical profile of the PM-designate setting out his banking, media and food-supply business interests and confirming he has not held prior cabinet, ministerial or parliamentary office. Translated from Arabic.

posts.headline: All Iraqi outlets converge on the al-Zaidi PM nomination ahead of the official announcement
posts.summary: AMrym flags that every major Iraqi news source was converging on the al-Zaidi nomination several hours before the official Coordination Framework statement, the leak pattern that confirmed the bloc had landed on the consensus pick. Translated from Arabic.

posts.headline: KDP increasingly floating snap KRG elections as the cabinet deadlock with PUK deepens
posts.summary: Kurdistan Watch reports the KDP is now openly floating a snap regional election as the way out of the cabinet stalemate with PUK, a calculated signal the party would rather re-test its 39-seat plurality than concede the Interior Ministry or top federal post on the PUK bundling demand.

posts.headline: UN Spokesperson appeals to the parties to open the Strait of Hormuz to commercial traffic
posts.summary: Bachar El Halabi retweets the UN Spokesperson's public appeal calling on the parties to lift their respective blockades and reopen the Strait of Hormuz to commercial shipping, the first explicit UN-level intervention since dual-blockade transits collapsed to single digits.
